user.title: Set up Room Presence
user.description: Select a person to track. Their Bermuda BLE area sensor will be auto-discovered.

data_description.person_entity: The person entity to track. Their Bermuda BLE area sensor will be discovered automatically from linked device trackers.
data_description.debounce_seconds: How long the person must stay in a room before the change is committed (5–300s). Increase to reduce bouncing noise.

error.no_bermuda_sensor: Could not find a Bermuda area sensor for this person. Make sure Bermuda is configured and the person has a linked BLE tracker.

abort.no_person_entities: No person entities found. Please configure people in Home Assistant first.
abort.all_persons_configured: All person entities are already configured.

data_description.debounce_seconds: How long the person must stay in a room before the change is committed (5–300 seconds).
